args.query: SELECT track_id FROM tracks WHERE LOWER(TRIM(artist)) = 'brucqe maginnis' AND LOWER(TRIM(title)) = 'street hype';

exec_args.sql: SELECT track_id FROM tracks WHERE LOWER(TRIM(artist)) = 'brucqe maginnis' AND LOWER(TRIM(title)) = 'street hype';

args.query: SELECT store, SUM(revenue_usd) as total_revenue FROM sales WHERE track_id = 4122 GROUP BY store ORDER BY total_revenue DESC;

exec_args.sql: SELECT store, SUM(revenue_usd) as total_revenue FROM sales WHERE track_id = 4122 GROUP BY store ORDER BY total_revenue DESC;

result.preview: "Amazon Music earned the most revenue from Brucqe Maginnis' song 'Street Hype', generating $304.13 USD across all countries."
